// note: Project MCP config — overrides the context7 plugin server so the Context7 API key reaches it. VERIFIED the hard way: (1) a key in settings.json/settings.local.json `env` does NOT reach MCP subprocesses; (2) ${CONTEXT7_API_KEY} expansion here is UNRELIABLE because a GUI/VSCode launch doesn't load your shell rc (~/.zshrc), so the var is often empty. The only reliable place is a LITERAL key in this env block — it becomes the MCP server process's real environment. THEREFORE: paste your key below AND keep this file gitignored (/caw:setup adds it to .gitignore). Get a free key at context7.com/dashboard. Leave the empty string to stay on Context7's anonymous tier (free; only rate-limited). NEVER commit a real key.
